description: C-Suite executive overview of the enterprise observability platform. Designed for board-level presentations. Updated in real-time.

options.content:
Observability Platform — Executive Summary

Enterprise Platform Engineering • Real-Time Status

Last Updated
Live • Auto-Refresh 1m

panels.title: Platform Availability
panels.description: Rolling availability calculated from non-5xx HTTP responses. Target: 99.9%

panels.title: Metrics Write SLO
panels.description: Mimir metrics ingestion SLO. 95th percentile write latency ≤ 500ms. Target: 95%

panels.title: Log Ingestion SLO
panels.description: Loki log ingestion SLO. 95th percentile write latency ≤ 500ms. Target: 95%

panels.title: Query Performance SLO
panels.description: Mimir query frontend SLO. Query enqueue latency ≤ 500ms. Target: 95%

panels.title: Error Budget Remaining
panels.description: 30-day error budget remaining. When this reaches 0%, the SLO is breached for the period.

panels.title: Active Users
panels.description: Currently active Grafana users across all instances.

panels.title: SLO Compliance — All Services (30 Day)
panels.description: 30-day SLO compliance trend for all platform services. The red dashed line marks the 95% SLO target. All services should remain above this line.

panels.title: Service Health Matrix
panels.description: Current SLO compliance by service. Green = excellent, amber = at target, red = breaching SLO.

panels.title: Platform Traffic Volume
panels.description: Total platform request throughput by service. Shows the scale and distribution of platform utilization.

panels.title: Cluster Capacity Utilization
panels.description: Request throughput by cluster. Helps identify capacity imbalances and plan scaling.

panels.title: User-Perceived Latency (P95)
panels.description: P95 latency for key user actions. Users notice degradation above 1 second.

panels.title: Error Impact Score
panels.description: Server error rates by service. Sustained rates above 1% indicate user-impacting issues.

panels.title: Dashboards
panels.description: Total number of dashboards across the platform.

panels.title: Data Sources
panels.description: Total number of configured data sources.

panels.title: Alert Rules
panels.description: Total number of alert rules configured across all organizations.

panels.title: Total Users
panels.description: Total registered users across the platform.

panels.title: Active Alerts
panels.description: Number of currently firing alert rules. Low is healthy.

options.content:
Platform Engineering Team • Observability Infrastructure
Admin Command Center → Security Analytics → Performance Deep Dive →

title: Observability Platform — Executive Summary
